effects.name: Light Gloom
effects.desc: This world is lightly obscured by a gloom cloud.

effects.name: PREDATOR STRAIN (Enemies)
effects.desc: A Gloom-enhanced strain of Terminids has been reported on this planet. SEAF patrols have been lured into ambushes, and picked off by unseen assailants. Every ounce of a Helldiver's superior senses will be required to hunt down this dangerous threat.

effects.name: RUPTURE STRAIN (ENEMIES)
effects.desc: Nothing to report

effects.name: HIVE LORDS (Enemies)
effects.desc: Terminid Hive Lords have been detected on this planet.

effects.desc: High Command has authorized the temporary addition of the Supply Pack Stratagem to all Helldiver loadouts.

effects.name: Gloom Border
effects.desc: This world is on the border of the interstellar wall of gloom.

effects.name: MERIDIAN BLACK HOLE (Stable)
effects.desc: The prosperous Meridia was corrupted into a Terminid Supercolony, necessitating its destruction using the mysterious Dark Fluid.  This galactic scar is all that remains.

effects.name: CAMPAIGN BLOCKER
effects.desc: Campaigns cannot be launched.

effects.desc: Nothing to report

effects.desc: The DSS deploys Eagle Strafing Runs during missions.
